call.no_camera: Cannot open camera. Switching to voice call...
call.peer_left: The other party has left the call.
call.no_camera_voice: Voice call does not have camera.
call.no_speaker_switch: Browser does not support speaker switching.
call.single_output: Current browser only supports default audio output.
call.speaker: Speaker
call.noise_gate_desc: The color bar jumping past the white mark means the mic opens. Drag the white mark above the yellow bar when NOT SPEAKING to block background noise/echo.
call.mic_gain_desc: Increase if your voice is too quiet or phone is far away. Decrease if sound is too loud.
call.wind_filter_desc: Removes low-frequency sounds from wind or traffic.
